title: Bat Removal & Exclusion Services in New Hyde Park, NY | $900 - $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in New Hyde Park, Long Island. Safe, humane bat extraction from attics and chimneys. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: New Hyde Park homeowners facing bat infestations need prompt, professional solutions to protect their families and properties. Our specialized bat removal and exclusion services safely eliminate bat colonies from attics, chimneys, and wall voids while preventing future re-entry. With humane extraction methods and comprehensive sealing techniques, we restore peace of mind to residences throughout this Nassau County community.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of bat management expertise to New Hyde Park, combining state-licensed wildlife technicians with proven exclusion methods that comply with New York wildlife protection laws. Our thorough approach includes complete attic inspection, guano cleanup, sanitization, and permanent entry point sealing—all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: New Hyde Park's mix of classic colonial homes, Tudor-style residences, and vintage properties along Hillside Avenue and surrounding neighborhoods often feature the architectural gaps and attic spaces that attract bat colonies seeking roosting sites. The mature trees throughout Lake Success borders and proximity to wooded areas make professional bat exclusion particularly important for maintaining property values in this desirable Long Island community.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my New Hyde Park home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds in your attic at dusk or dawn, brown staining near roof edges or vents, small dark droppings in attic spaces, and seeing bats emerge from your roofline at sunset. New Hyde Park's older homes often have entry points around chimneys, roof vents, and fascia boards where bats can enter through openings as small as 3/8 of an inch.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: Yes, but it must be done humanely and in compliance with New York State wildlife regulations. Bats cannot be harmed or relocated during maternity season (roughly May through August when flightless pups are present). Our licensed technicians use exclusion devices that allow bats to leave naturally while preventing re-entry, ensuring full legal compliance throughout the removal process.

faqs.question: What does the $900-$2,500 price range include?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on colony size, number of entry points, and accessibility. Our service includes complete attic inspection, humane bat exclusion using one-way devices, sealing all entry points with wildlife-proof materials, guano removal, attic sanitization and deodorization, and a warranty against re-entry. Most New Hyde Park single-family homes fall in the $1,200-$1,800 range for standard infestations.

faqs.question: How long does bat exclusion take in New Hyde Park?
faqs.answer: The initial exclusion device installation typically takes 3-5 hours depending on your home's size and number of entry points. Bats usually vacate within 3-7 days. We return after one week to remove exclusion devices and permanently seal all entry points. The entire process, including follow-up inspection and cleanup, is generally completed within 2-3 weeks from initial assessment.
